steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
$125\%$ more than a value means the new value is the original plus $125\%$ of the original:
$$
1+1.25=2.25
$$
So the yearly growth factor is $2.25$.

steps.title: Find the starting value
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the estimated number of rabbits at the end of $2016$. Since the end of $2017$ is $t=1$, use $n=180$:
$$
180=a(2.25)^1
$$
$$
180=2.25a
$$
$$
a=80
$$

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content: Use starting value $80$ and growth factor $2.25$: $$ n=80(2.25)^t $$ The answer is B.
